title: nasturtium amphibium subsp. terrestre
intro: Nasturtium amphibium subsp. terrestre, also known as terrestrial watercress, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The plant has been found to offer health benefits, such as reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Nasturtium amphibium subsp. terrestre can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and salves, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
